case_title: MARKET STREET 76 VS OSORIO, CAROL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, CAROL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAMENA, REZA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOSANJH, RAMINDER S.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-08-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-13-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE OF DEFT OSORIO, CAROL. DEFT DOSANJH, RAMINDER S. FAILED TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKET STREET 76 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSORIO, CAROL ISLAMENA, REZA DOSANJH, RAMINDER S. $3,940.43 PRINCIPAL, $172.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,112.43, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO APPEAR. DEFENDANTS HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,940.43 FILED BY MARKET STREET 76 AS TO DEFENDANT OSORIO, CAROL ISLAMENA, REZA DOSANJH, RAMINDER S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
